message:
Add SQLite transaction drop safety, stream adapter zero-read guard, and spawn_blocking wake fix

sqlite.rs: Add needs_rollback AtomicBool flag to SqliteConnection for
detecting uncommitted transactions that were dropped without explicit
commit or rollback. Surfaces in Debug output for diagnostics. This
supports T6.3 MySQL-parity transaction drop safety semantics.

stream_adapters.rs: Add early return for zero-remaining-capacity reads
in the AsyncRead poll_read implementation. When the caller provides a
full buffer (remaining == 0), immediately return Ok(()) instead of
attempting to read into a zero-length slice, which could cause
downstream readers to spin or return spurious errors.

spawn_blocking.rs: Refactor BlockingOneshot::send() to extract the
waker before dropping the mutex guard (wake-outside-lock pattern),
consistent with the same fix applied across uring, gRPC, TCP, and
time primitives.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
